launch.choose_mode: Choose the mode that matches your setup

dual.label: Dual Screen
dual.desc: A touch screen for navigation and control, a second 4K screen for media output.

display.label: Display Only
display.desc: A single screen dedicated to displaying media or a web page.

control.label: Control + View
control.desc: A touch screen for navigation and media viewing.

display.title: Display Settings
display.screen_setup.desc: Configure display resolution, orientation and windowing behaviour.
display.fullscreen.hint: Launch the app covering the entire screen.
display.dpi_scale.hint: Auto = let Qt decide based on screen DPI.

behavior.title: Behavior Settings
behavior.startup.desc: Control how the kiosk application launches on boot.
behavior.startup_delay.hint: Wait N seconds after boot before launching.
behavior.kiosk_lock.desc: Prevent users from accessing the OS or closing the app accidentally.
behavior.kiosk_mode: Enable kiosk lock (blocks Alt-F4, task-switcher, etc.)
behavior.disable_keyboard: Block OS keyboard shortcuts (Win key, Alt-Tab…)
behavior.exit_gesture.desc: Choose how a technician can force-exit kiosk mode without a physical keyboard.
behavior.exit_taps.hint: 5 = easy · 7 = balanced · 10 = hard to trigger accidentally.
behavior.exit_timeout.hint: All taps must occur within this time window.

header.title: Header Settings
header.visibility.desc: The header bar appears at the top of the kiosk UI.
header.logo.desc: Supports local file paths and remote URLs. SVG recommended for 4K.
header.logo_clickable: Logo is the exit gesture target
header.show_theme_toggle: Show dark/light theme toggle in header

mapping.title: Field Mapping
mapping.desc: Map each UI concept to the actual field name(s) in your API / data source. Enter multiple candidates separated by commas.
mapping.presets.desc: Apply a field-name convention common to popular CMS / API platforms.
